root_cause.summary: The Go test `TestHuhPrompterMultiSelectWithSearchPersistence/selections_persist_after_changing_search_query` in package `github.com/cli/cli/v2/internal/prompter` (file `huh_prompter_test.go:478`) failed on the macos-latest runner with the message `form.Run() did not complete in time`. The test wraps a TUI prompter form; the failure indicates `form.Run()` did not return before the test's internal time bound elapsed — characteristic of a timing flake on the slower macOS runner rather than a logic bug. Only this single subtest in only this single OS configuration failed, driving the macos-latest job to exit code 1.

required_signals.value: form.Run() did not complete in time

evidence_spans.reason: Primary Go test failure block: parent `--- FAIL: TestHuhPrompterMultiSelectWithSearchPersistence`, the failing subtest `selections_persist_after_changing_search_query`, the failure message `huh_prompter_test.go:478: form.Run() did not complete in time`, the bare `FAIL` marker, and the package-level `FAIL github.com/cli/cli/v2/internal/prompter 8.475s` summary. Sufficient on its own to identify root cause and locate the failure.
Trailing job-level `FAIL` summary + GHA `##[error]Process completed with exit code 1.` annotation that closes the failing step. Confirms the package-level failure propagated to the job exit code.
